findings.issue: GestureDetector is used without any Semantics wrappers in the app code
findings.fix: Wrap custom tap targets in Semantics(label: ..., button: true, child: ...), or replace with semantic controls such as ElevatedButton/IconButton/ListTile where appropriate.

findings.issue: Icon-only controls may lack accessible names
findings.fix: Use IconButton tooltip, Semantics labels, or visible text for icon-only actions.

passed_checks: Text fields use InputDecoration/labelText patterns in the source.
Source inspected: 18 Dart files under Flutter app code.
Project has Flutter structure (`pubspec.yaml`, `lib/`, Android/iOS folders) suitable for static mobile audit.
